priority_actions: Add a range-check indicator to hotbar spell icons that updates as the player hovers over the battlefield.
Refine targeting visualization for vertical architecture to clearly show why a path is interrupted on stairs.
Verify that all high-level boss environmental mechanics (like Soul Pillars) maintain a 1:1 ratio of mechanical destruction to visual spectacle.
top_highlight: The transition from dialogue to combat is accompanied by a dramatic visual payoff and one of the game's most celebrated musical tracks. The player's refusal to skip the cinematic indicates high narrat
